THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 139 BROOKDALE AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,299.48 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,299.48, LEASE FORFEITED, - JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO BREACH IN TERMS OF STIPULATION. JUDGMENT BREAKDOWN: $1951.00 RENT, AND $348.48 PER DIEM. SEE SCANNED DOC.
